settings.heading: Crystal vs Acrylic Trophy: Which Should You Choose?
settings.subheading: Crystal or acrylic? A clear comparison of look, weight, durability, printing, shipping and price — so you pick the right award for your event and budget. By Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Choose crystal for a premium, weighty, prestigious award (leadership, VIP, milestones); choose acrylic for a lighter, cheaper, shatter-resistant award that takes full-colour printing and ships safely in bulk. Crystal from ₹350; acrylic from ₹250. Meru Trophy makes both. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Side-by-side
settings.text:
• Look & feel: crystal is clearer, heavier and more premium; acrylic is clean and modern but lighter.
  • Full-colour printing: acrylic excels at UV-printed logos/photos; crystal is best for engraved/3D logos.
  • Durability & shipping: acrylic is shatter-resistant and cheaper to ship in bulk; crystal needs careful packing.
  • Price: acrylic from ₹250; crystal from ₹350 and up for larger pieces.
  • Best for: crystal → senior/VIP awards; acrylic → high-volume, budget or shipped events.

settings.heading: Quick recommendation
settings.text: For a small number of senior/VIP awards, go crystal — the weight and clarity carry prestige. For high-volume, budget-sensitive or shipped events, go acrylic — it looks modern, prints in full colour and travels safely. Still unsure? We'll quote both so you can compare in hand.

settings.question: Is crystal better than acrylic?
settings.answer: Neither is universally better — crystal is more premium; acrylic is lighter, cheaper and prints full colour. Choose by occasion and budget.

settings.question: Which is cheaper?
settings.answer: Acrylic, generally — and it's cheaper to ship in bulk because it's light and shatter-resistant.

settings.question: Which looks more premium?
settings.answer: Crystal — its clarity and weight read as prestigious for senior awards.

settings.question: Can I see both before deciding?
settings.answer: Yes — we'll quote and show both so you can compare.

settings.heading: Still deciding?
settings.text: Tell us what you're planning — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
